title: 📰 OpenClaw Setup Progress — Day 1
content:
✅ LIVE & WORKING
• Gmail / GoG — read, send, search, calendar, drive, sheets all connected
• Apollo API — authenticated and ready for lead searches
• Dashboard — running at 82ebc6e5-eeae-4532-8331-325d82345028.cfargotunnel.com
• Cloudflare Tunnel — named tunnel (matthew-dashboard) running permanently
• 7:00 AM Workout Email — live, sends 4 HYROX/strength/CrossFit workouts daily
• 8:30 AM Daily Briefing — live (this one!)
• 9:00 PM Evening Debrief — live
• 11:00 PM Daily Backup — live, saves to Documents/Backup
• GoG Keyring — configured with persistent password
• Shell/Exec access — enabled for autonomous operation
• Desktop Startup Script — on Windows desktop (StartOpenClaw.vbs)
• All 8 dashboard tabs built: Tasks, Agents, Systems, Memory, Goals, Meta Agent, ICPs, LinkedIn Posts, Briefings

🔄 IN PROGRESS
• dashboard.nthlayerbot.co.uk — DNS record set in Cloudflare, waiting for domain nameservers to point to Cloudflare
• Recipe agent — plan approved, building tab + cron
• Podcast tab — plan approved, waiting on podcast list + SoundCloud username
• Community discussion tracker — plan approved, needs Google Sheet ID
• SQLite backend — plan approved, ready to build
• Job application agent — plan approved, needs CV + Gmail folder names
• High-signal lead gen agent — designed, ready to build

⏳ PENDING YOUR ACTION
• Run wsl --shutdown in PowerShell (unlocks LinkedIn browser automation)
• Share Pipedrive API key
• Share Brave Search API key (from api.search.brave.com)
• Share Readwise API token (from readwise.io/access_token)
• Share SoundCloud username
• Share CV for job application agent
• Create Google Sheet for community tracker and share ID
• Update nthlayerbot.co.uk nameservers at registrar to Cloudflare
• Share remaining Q1 goals

🔒 BLOCKED
• LinkedIn automation — needs WSL mirrored networking (fix: run wsl --shutdown in PowerShell, then reopen WSL)
• Web search — needs Brave API key
• Amanda Recall.ai LinkedIn scrape — needs browser working

📈 GOAL PROGRESS
• Sonesse hot leads: 0 / 10 (Apollo connected, lead gen agent not yet running)
• Nth Layer deal: 0 / 1 (no pipeline data yet — Pipedrive key needed)

🗓️ TODAY'S AGENTS
• 7:00 AM — Workout email ✅
• 8:30 AM — This briefing ✅
• 9:00 PM — Evening debrief
• 11:00 PM — Backup

💡 ONE THING
Run wsl --shutdown in Windows PowerShell right now. It takes 30 seconds and unlocks LinkedIn browser automation, which is the highest-value thing currently blocked.
